subject: WM-0087 ready for review
body: Added Chrome Stable / Edge Stable Web gate measurement tooling and WM-0087 evidence report; build:web, web-shell e2e, taskctl validate, git diff --check and pnpm quality passed; pnpm bench failed on the protected existing m5-alpha-content-long-run baseline (+92.81%), shell interaction P95 misses the 12 ms target, and same-spec Web remains blocked with demo-only evidence at best.
